JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS KRISTINA ZEBRATSKI, GEORGE CRAIG, AND, CRAWLEY WARREN INSURANCE SERVICES, INC., DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER IS OVERRULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED IN PART. DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF FEHA. PLEADING SUFFICIENT TO APPRISE DEFENDANT THAT PLAINTIFF IS ALLEGING RACE DISCRIMINATION. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THIRD, CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. THE CAUSE OF ACTION ARISES OUT OF CONDUCT FOR WHICH WORKER'S COMPENSATION IS EXCLUSIVE REMEDY, AND SUPERVISORS NOT INDIVIDUALLY LIABLE. SEE RENO VS. BAIRD (1998) 18 CAL. 4TH 640. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SIXTH (SIC) CAUSE OF ACTION FOR INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE WHICH DEFENDANTS ARE THE SUBJECT OF THE CAUSE OF ACTION (CRC 2.112.) PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD EXTREME AND OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT BY A DEFENDANT, THE INTENTION TO CAUSE OR RECKLESS DISREGARD OF THE PROBABILITY OF CAUSING EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, SEVERE EMOTIONAL SUFFERING, AND ACTUAL AND PROXIMATE CAUSATION OF THE EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
